description_long: This is a modern residential complex featuring multiple single-story houses arranged symmetrically around a central swimming pool. The property is enclosed by a white perimeter wall and includes landscaped green areas, paved walkways, and a parking lot with marked spaces. Each house has a flat or gently sloped roof, with some featuring covered patios or porches. The central area is dominated by a large, rectangular pool, flanked by communal spaces and what appears to be a clubhouse or shared facility. The exterior color palette is primarily white with accents of beige, terracotta, and green from the lawns. The overall layout is organized and designed for communal living, with clear separation between private and shared spaces.
description: A modern, single-story residential complex with multiple houses, a central pool, landscaped grounds, and a parking lot, all enclosed by a white perimeter wall.
description_view_0: View 0 shows the front of the complex with the main entrance, parking lot, and a clear view of the central pool and surrounding houses.
description_view_1: View 1 highlights the rear of the complex, showcasing the pool, the symmetrical arrangement of houses, and the green spaces.
description_view_2: View 2 provides a side perspective, revealing the clubhouse, additional communal areas, and the layout of the parking and access roads.
description_view_3: View 3 offers a rear approach, emphasizing the pool, the backyards of the houses, and the overall symmetry of the complex.
attribute_entryway_design: Main entryway features a wide gate, paved approach, and covered porches with simple columns and minimal decorative elements.
